'''鈭歭-s-h-dh''' ('''kalashedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beard|beard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-h-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beard|beard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-s-h-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kalashedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilashedhoko|thilashedhoko]] || [[word:jilashedhoko|jilashedhoko]] || [[word:shilashedhoko|shilashedhoko]] || [[word:kilashedhoko|kilashedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lashedhoko|th忙lashedhoko]] || [[word:j忙lashedhoko|j忙lashedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙lashedhoko|sh忙lashedhoko]] || [[word:k忙lashedhoko|k忙lashedhoko]]
|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
